title: SWD Club T20 fixtures for the weekend
description: CRICKET NEWS - The remaining pool matches in...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The remaining pool matches in the SWDC T20 League competition will be contested this weekend, 20 and 21 September.


> The pool winners will advance to the quarter-finals, which will be played on 27 September.


The women’s T20 competition will kick off on Saturday.

Saturday 20 September

• Pool B:

Knysna Cavaliers vs Kranshoek Cobras; Hartenbos vs Kranshoek Cobras; Thembalethu vs Hartenbos - Venue: Loerie Park in Knysna

• Pool C:

NMU vs Beaufort West (10:00) - Venue: Central High School

• Pool D:

New Dawn Park vs KwaNonqaba; Pacaltsdorp United vs New Dawn Park; KwaNonqaba vs Blanco - Venue: Pacaltsdorp Sportsground

• Pool E:

Ramblers vs George; Mayflower vs Ramblers; George vs Mayflower - Venue: Rooirivierrif

• Pool F:

Plett Pioneers vs Heidelberg United CC (10:00) - Venue: New Horizons Sportsground

• Pool G:

Union Stars II vs Western Hope; Union Stars II vs Bongolethu; Western Hope vs Pirates United - Venue: Bridgton B field

• Pool H:

Sussex vs Melkhoutfontein; Albertinia vs Ladismith; Sussex vs Ladismith Albertinia CC vs Sussex CC - Venue: D’Almeida Sportsground.

Sunday 21 September

• Pool A:

Union Stars I vs Mossel Bay; Union Stars I vs Calitzdorp Young Stars; Dysselsdorp vs Union Stars I - Venue: Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn

• Pool G:

Pirates United vs Union Stars II (10:00) Pirates United vs Bongolethu (12:30) - Venue: Loerie Park, Knysna.

SWD Women’s Club T20 knock-out competition:

• Sussex vs George; Pacaltsdorp United vs Sussex; Sussex vs Plett Pioneers -Venue: Van Riebeeck A field

• Union Stars vs Dysselsdorp; Thembalethu vs Harlequins Forces; Union Stars vs Knysna Cavaliers - Venue: Van Riebeeck B field

• Knysna Cavaliers vs Harlequins Forces; George vs Plett Pioneers; Dysselsdorp vs Thembalethu -Venue: Van Riebeeck C field.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
